description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with a prominent, multi-faceted gable roof covered in dark gray tiles. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored siding, complemented by large, rectangular windows that provide ample natural light to the interior. The structure includes a covered porch area on one side, and a concrete entry platform leading to the main door. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some extending nearly to the roofline, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The roof has a complex geometry with intersecting planes and a single chimney visible. The overall appearance is sleek and functional, suitable for a suburban or urban neighborhood.
description: A modern house with a dark gable roof, light siding, and large asymmetrical windows, featuring a covered porch and concrete entry platform.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main facade with two large windows, the covered porch on the left, and the sloped roof extending over the entry platform.
description_view_1: From this angle, the main entry door and a single window are visible, along with the full length of the gable roof and the concrete platform.
description_view_2: The rear of the house is shown here, with a single small window and the intersecting roof planes dominating the view.
description_view_3: This top-down perspective emphasizes the complex, multi-faceted gable roof and the overall footprint of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a single door with a concrete platform and a covered porch, no decorative columns.
